markets.name: Knoxville / Knox County, TN
markets.thesis: TN live-first permit market: KGIS public permits and parcel layers give the fastest verified builder-signal plus skip-trace research loop.

markets.name: Nashville / Davidson County, TN
markets.platform: Metro Nashville Codes ArcGIS Daily Reports
markets.thesis: High-growth Tennessee perimeter market; Metro Nashville daily permit reports expose a public ArcGIS feed for verified residential new-build builder signals before seller promotion.

markets.name: Chattanooga / Hamilton County, TN
markets.thesis: TN builder-sprawl source well; pull permit builders before parcel sourcing.

markets.name: Murfreesboro / Rutherford County, TN
markets.thesis: Hot TN builder-sprawl jurisdiction; CivicPlus permit monitoring should feed buyer validation first.

markets.name: Franklin / Williamson County, TN
markets.thesis: High-value TN infill/perimeter market; direct portal source review before parcel calls.

markets.name: Polk County / Lakeland, FL
markets.thesis: Top inland FL target with builder demand and less coastal insurance friction.

markets.name: Ocala / Marion County, FL
markets.thesis: Inland FL resource well; prioritize permit-active builders and quarter/rural-edge lot criteria.

markets.name: Clermont / Lake County, FL
markets.thesis: Inland Orlando-edge growth market; monitor permit portal migration and builder concentration.

markets.name: Gainesville / Alachua County, FL
markets.thesis: Inland FL permit well with manageable fragmentation.

markets.name: Maricopa County / Phoenix-Mesa, AZ
markets.platform: Maricopa weekly permit reports + Accela cities
markets.thesis: AZ goldmine: weekly permit activity reports normalize Phoenix-metro builder velocity.

markets.name: Tucson / Pima County, AZ
markets.thesis: Secondary AZ permit well; Accela-style builder evidence before seller sourcing.

markets.name: Buckeye, AZ
markets.thesis: Fast-growth Phoenix-edge market; source review and portal monitoring.

markets.name: Joshua Tree 92252 / San Bernardino County, CA
markets.platform: BuildZoom public profiles + San Bernardino County permit follow-up
markets.thesis: High-desert custom-builder ZIP sprint. Buyer-validation lane is loaded; water/access/desert-build/STR constraints must be captured before seller sourcing.

markets.name: Puna / East Hawaii ZIPs 96749, 96778, 96771
markets.platform: BuildZoom public profiles + Hawaii County permit follow-up
markets.thesis: Big Island/Puna builder-call lane. Keep lava zone, flood, access, and off-grid utility deal killers explicit before seller sourcing.

markets.name: Pahrump 89048 / Nye County, NV
markets.platform: BuildZoom public profiles + Nye County permit follow-up
markets.thesis: Desert-lot builder-call lane. Capture well/septic/power/road thresholds before seller sourcing.

markets.name: Raleigh / Wake County, NC
markets.thesis: NC Piedmont corridor source well with direct ArcGIS permit data.

markets.name: Boise / Ada County, ID
markets.platform: City of Boise ArcGIS activity + BCA SW Idaho builder directory
markets.thesis: Idaho growth-market lane. Current public permit layer lacks contractor fields, so BCA builder candidates stay buyer-validation until permit/contact enrichment.

markets.name: Lafayette / Tippecanoe County, IN
markets.thesis: Indiana official-permit lane. Public layer exposes owner/developer on new residential/new-build permits but not contractor contact; enrich company/contact/buy box before seller sourcing.

markets.name: Charlotte / Mecklenburg County, NC
markets.platform: Accela + Power BI Daily Building Permits
markets.thesis: Large NC buyer market; use direct permit dashboards and Buildchek coverage.

markets.name: Greensboro / Guilford County, NC
markets.thesis: Piedmont corridor seller/builder well once buyer evidence is captured.

markets.name: Concord / Cabarrus County, NC
markets.thesis: ArcGIS source well for permit and parcel normalization.

markets.name: Austin, TX
markets.thesis: TX open-data beachhead; useful but lower than TN/FL/AZ/NC under current stack.

markets.name: San Antonio, TX
markets.thesis: TX open-data permit well with daily normalization potential.

markets.name: Plano / Collin County, TX
markets.thesis: DFW-edge resource well; direct portal/PermitVector required before seller sourcing.

markets.name: McAllen, TX
markets.thesis: Accela-powered TX resource well; lower priority than open-data TX markets.

markets.name: Forsyth County / Atlanta data-center corridor, GA
markets.platform: Forsyth ArcGIS EnerGov layer + Tyler SelfService detail
markets.thesis: GA secondary source well: high Atlanta/data-center corridor relevance, but current public layer has no contractor field; solve Tyler detail before builder promotion.

markets.name: Dorchester County / Charleston edge, SC
markets.thesis: SC coastal-edge live queue: Dorchester exposes contractor names and clears the 20-builder floor for Charleston-edge buyer validation.

markets.name: Hall County / Gainesville, GA
markets.thesis: GA data-center/NE Atlanta corridor source candidate; PDF issued-permit reports need extraction/OCR before builder queue.

markets.name: Berkeley County / Charleston edge, SC
markets.thesis: Strong Charleston expansion county, but portal blocks this environment; keep as watchlist until a reliable public/API path is found.

markets.name: Jackson County, GA
markets.thesis: GA I-85/data-center corridor watchlist; build permit adapter only after public contractor rows are verified.

markets.name: Douglas County / Atlanta west, GA
markets.thesis: GA west-Atlanta data-center/workforce-housing watchlist; source review before seller sourcing.

markets.name: Greenville County, SC
markets.thesis: Upstate SC secondary builder market; source review after Dorchester/Berkeley.

To construct 2-story, 4 bedroom, 2.5 bath SF dwelling with 1,680 SF conditioned space, 400 SF garage and 24 SF covered porch and 140 SF uncovered patio. Structure height and setbacks per Final SP Site Plan. Zoned SP. Not to eb constructed over or obstruct any easements. The holder of this permit hereby certifies that all construction and demolition waste will be disposed in an approved landfill. The holder of this permit also certifies that no construction or demolition waste shall be stored on property in violation of any provisions of the metropolitan code. For every 50 feet of site frontage, a double-sided sign 24” x 36” in size must be posted in English and Spanish that contains the information required by ordinance no. 2017-835. No more than three signs are required. For every 30 feet of street frontage, or fraction thereof, one 2-inch caliper tree as listed in the urban forestry approved tree list shall be planted on the subject property.

recentPermits.purpose: TO CONSTRUCT A 4BR,3.5 BA SINGLE-FAMILY RESIDENCE UNIT A, AS PART OF A DETACHED HORIZONTAL PROPERTY REGIME (HPR). RESIDENCE WILL CONTAIN 2275 SF OF LIVING SPACE, 428 SF GARAGE, AND 176 SF OF PORCHES AND/OR DECKS. SETBACKS PER DTC & MDHA. MUST CONFORM TO ALL EASEMENTS ON PROPERTY. TOTAL BUILDING COVERAGE ON PARCEL NOT TO EXCEED 45%.INDIVIDUAL SINGLE AND TWO-FAMILY LOT TREE DENSITY STANDARDS APPLY PURSUANT TO M.C.L. 17.24.100, INCLUDING AT LEAST ONE TWO-INCH CALIPER TREE FOR EACH THIRTY FEET OF LOT FRONTAGE (OR PORTION THEREOF), EXCLUDING ALLEY FRONTAGE. SIGNAGE MUST BE POSTED PURSUANT TO M.C.L. 16.28.230, INCLUDING PROJECT INFORMATION SIGNS, WHICH SHALL BE POSTED IN ENGLISH AND SPANISH WITH ONE DOUBLE-SIDED 24 (VERTICAL) × 36 (HORIZONTAL) SIGN POSTED FOR EVERY FIFTY FEET OF SITE FRONTAGE, WITH NO MORE THAN THREE SIGNS REQUIRED PER STREET FRONTAGE. NO CONSTRUCTION AND/OR DEMOLITION WASTE SHALL BE STORED ON THE PROPERTY ALL SUCH WASTE GENERATED BY ANY AND ALL ACTIVITIES GOVERNED BY THIS PERMIT SHALL BE DISPOSED OF IN AN APPROVED LANDFILL.

To construct single-family residence (1,313 sf footprint) with 1,910 sqft of living area, 420 sqft of attached garage/storage area and 180 sqft of porch/deck area. 45' min. front setback, 5’ min. side setback, 20’ min. rear setback. Maximum building height 2.5 stories. Not to build over or obstruct any easements on property. New residence to be constructed at same location on parcel as previous single-family residence (1,370sf building footprint) demolished CADM-2024062651. To utilize existing driveway, ramp & curb cut. For every 30 feet of street frontage or fraction thereof, one 2-inch caliper tree as listed in the urban forestry approved tree list shall be planted on the subject property. For every 50 feet of site frontage a double-sided sign 24 x36' in size must be posted in English and Spanish that contains the information required by Ordinance No. 2017-835. no more than three signs are required.

To install 12'x20' inground pool to rear of unit A. Pool not to extend more than 12” above grade. New single family residence with 1852 square feet, and Covered porch 25 SQFT . 5' MIN. SIDE SETBACK, 20' MIN. Rear setback, and 36.1' front setback. Max. height allowed is 30ft.
